title: Context Shift Response Explorer
description: Explain how changing task, device, time pressure, journey stage, and decision stakes can change a persona's evaluation without changing its core profile.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: AI Persona Testing
Marketing Research
Context Shift Response Explorer

learningObjectives: Explain how changing task, device, time pressure, journey stage, and decision stakes can change a persona's evaluation without changing its core profile.
prerequisites: Basic familiarity with customer research and AI personas

commonMisconceptions: Synthetic agreement is equivalent to validated customer evidence.
assessmentOpportunities: Explain how changing task, device, time pressure, journey stage, and decision stakes can change a persona's evaluation without changing its core profile.
